name: @metorial/opencage
description: Convert addresses and place names to geographic coordinates (forward geocoding) and coordinates to addresses (reverse geocoding) using open data worldwide. Retrieve location annotations including timezone, currency, sunrise/sunset times, driving side, road info, and alternative coordinate formats (geohash, what3words, Maidenhead, Mercator). Filter results by country code, bounding box, proximity, language, and confidence level. Perform autosuggest/geosearch for type-ahead location lookups. Batch geocode spreadsheets and CSV files. Supports JSON, GeoJSON, and XML output formats.
